ALL FUTURE LAW AND MOTION MATTERS MUST BE NOTICED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501. THE PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PAPERS THEY FILED ON THE DEMURRER TO DEPARTMENT WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN JULY 27. DEMURRER TO GENERAL DENIAL
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Mercedes A. Gavin for Plaintiff John Stewart Company the moving party.
No appearance by the opposing party.

The Court addopts the tentaive ruling in the matter of PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY DEMURRER TO GENERAL DENIAL as the following, sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Leslie Gomez, Not Recorded (501)

DEMURRER TO GENERAL DENIAL
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Continued To Aug-03-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER TO GENERAL DENIAL - The demurrer will be heard at 9:30am on August 3, 2018 in department 501, the real property/housing court. All future law and motion matters must be noticed to be heard in department 501. The parties are required to provide courtesy copies of all papers they filed on the demurrer to department with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than July 27. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =(302/HK)
